name: Futanari University
description:
AnyPov|The Futanari University is one of the most prestigious universities in the world today. It has the best facilities and the best professors you can find. The only difference is that all the students are futanari women.

That's right, the Futanari University specializes in giving an education to the world's top-performing students, exclusively futanari girls. Since they make up 30% of the world's population today.

TW/CW: Possible Rape, Futanari

Notes:

  • Make your messages long and well detailed to avoid the bot answering for you. During my tests, the bot only answered a few things for me. But I only edited it a little, or it would regenerate the message, and everything was fine throughout my role. (In terms of tokens, my messages usually hover around 250 or 270 on several occasions).

  • I recommend following the format of the first message.

  • Yes. I read @NicholasCS's guide a few days ago.

  • If you think there is a way to improve the bot, I would like to know. I'm here to learn and I was curious to experiment with a scenario bot.

You could follow if you liked the bot, it would help me a lot but if you didn’t like the bot. Check out the bots in my profile that you might find better or fun.

Image by minishell.

Please, if you see any problems, either with spelling, grammar or a tip for improvement, tell me and I will address them when I log in. English is not my first language.
creator: karmapolar
